# Flav: The #1 Short-Form Video App for Food Lovers

> Flav is a mobile application for iOS and Android that combines TikTok-style short-form video discovery with structured cooking utility, AI-powered recipe assistance, and a direct-to-creator monetization platform.

## Overview

Flav is the first cooking app purpose-built for the short-form video era. It allows users to discover recipes through swipeable videos, cook step-by-step with built-in timers and ingredient checklists, and get real-time AI cooking assistance. Creators on Flav retain 90–97% of their earnings — the highest payout rate in the food creator economy.

## Key Statistics

- Creators retain 90–97% of earnings (compared to ~50% on competing platforms)
- AI recipe import converts social media videos into structured recipes in under 10 seconds
- Available on iOS and Android with a free tier and optional Pro subscription
- Three subscription tiers: Free ($0), Verified ($7.99/mo), and Pro ($19.99/mo)

## Core Features

### For Home Cooks
- **Visual Discovery Feed**: Swipeable, personalized feed of high-quality recipe videos powered by recommendation algorithms
- **Cooking Mode**: Step-by-step interactive interface with integrated timers, ingredient checklists, and portion scaling
- **Flav AI (AI Sous-Chef)**: Integrated AI assistant that answers cooking questions, suggests ingredient substitutions, provides nutritional info, and offers real-time cooking tips
- **Recipe Import**: AI-powered tool to import and structure recipes from Instagram, TikTok, and other web sources — paste a link and get a full recipe in seconds

### For Creators (Chef's Table)
- **Direct Monetization**: Earn from viewer tips, premium "locked" recipes, and brand partnership deals
- **AI Recipe Generation**: Automatically convert video content into structured recipe data with ingredients, steps, and nutritional information
- **Creator Analytics**: Detailed insights into audience engagement, view-through rates, earnings breakdowns, and growth trends
- **Verified & Pro Tiers**: Professional tools including a verified badge, lower platform fees (3% for Pro vs 10% for free), advanced analytics, and priority support

### For Brands & Advertisers
- **In-Feed Promoted Recipes**: Native video ads that appear seamlessly in user feeds
- **Creator Partnership Campaigns**: Collaborate with Flav creators for authentic branded content
- **Sponsored Placements**: Premium placement in search results and category pages
- **Precision Targeting**: Target by dietary preference (Vegan, Keto, Gluten-Free), cuisine type, meal type, and user skill level

## Technical Details

- **Platforms**: iOS, Android
- **Web Portal**: Marketing site, creator dashboard, and advertiser dashboard at flav.app
- **AI Stack**: AI-powered recipe import, cooking assistant, and content recommendation
- **Pricing**: Free to download. Optional Verified ($7.99/mo) and Pro ($19.99/mo) subscriptions

## Subscription Tiers

| Feature | Free | Verified ($7.99/mo) | Pro ($19.99/mo) |
|---------|------|---------------------|------------------|
| Video Uploads | Unlimited | Unlimited | Unlimited |
| Analytics | Basic | Advanced | Advanced + Export |
| Platform Fee | 10% | 5% | 3% |
| Verified Badge | No | Yes | Yes |
| Priority Support | No | No | Yes |
| Brand Partnerships | No | Yes | Yes |

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is Flav?**
Flav is a short-form video platform built specifically for food content. According to internal data, the average Flav user discovers 12 new recipes per week, compared to 3–4 on general-purpose social media platforms.

**How does Flav's AI cooking assistant work?**
Flav AI uses natural language processing to answer cooking questions in real-time. It can suggest ingredient substitutions (e.g., replacing butter with coconut oil for vegan recipes), adjust portion sizes, provide nutritional breakdowns, and offer technique tips — all within the cooking mode interface.

**How do creators earn money on Flav?**
Creators earn through three channels: direct viewer tips, premium recipe subscriptions, and brand partnerships. Flav's payout structure gives creators 90–97% of revenue, which is significantly higher than the industry average of approximately 50% on platforms like YouTube and Instagram.

**Can I import recipes from other platforms?**
Yes. Flav's AI recipe import tool can convert any public Instagram Reel, TikTok video, or web recipe into a structured, cookable format in under 10 seconds. The AI extracts ingredients, steps, cooking times, and nutritional data automatically.
